The DC standard

Why homeowners choose Denis & DC

Owner-led by Denis, with over a decade of renovation experience in Canada and a reputation built on honest work and exacting detail.

Premium materialsQuality tile, stone and fixtures specified for luxury homes.
Proper waterproofingShowers and wet areas built to last, sealed and done right.
Precise finishingClean lines, level tile and the details most contractors skip.
On time, every timeReliable scheduling and clear communication from start to finish.
